bornoFlow.title: About BornoFlow
bornoFlow.body: BornoFlow is a modern learning, career, and productivity platform designed for Computer Science, Software Engineering, and IT students.
bornoFlow.ecosystem: The platform combines interactive career roadmaps, AI-powered learning, interview preparation, university guidance, developer tools, resume building, project-based learning, and productivity tools into one integrated ecosystem.
bornoFlow.goal: Our goal is to bridge the gap between academic learning and real-world software engineering careers.
bornoFlow.mission: Our mission is to provide structured roadmaps, interactive learning, interview preparation, developer tools, university guidance, and career resources—all in one platform.

bornosoft.title: About Bornosoft
bornosoft.body: Bornosoft is a software company focused on building modern SaaS platforms, AI-powered applications, developer tools, automation systems, and educational technologies.
bornosoft.belief: We believe in creating products that empower students, developers, startups, and businesses with practical technology solutions.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: To become one of the leading technology companies building innovative educational and developer-focused products for the global community.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: To empower students and developers with world-class learning resources, AI-powered tools, and modern software solutions that accelerate career growth.

founders.title: Meet the Founders
founders.subtitle: Bornosoft is led by passionate engineers building technology that empowers the next generation of software professionals.

nayeem.bio: Mohammad Ali Nayeem is a Software Engineering student and Full Stack Developer with a passion for building scalable web applications, AI-powered platforms, developer tools, and educational technology. He leads the technical architecture and product development of BornoFlow while focusing on creating practical solutions for students and developers.

reduan.bio: Reduan Ahmad is a Software Engineer passionate about software architecture, modern web technologies, scalable systems, and innovative digital products. As Co-Founder of Bornosoft, he contributes to product strategy, engineering excellence, and building reliable technology solutions.

products.title: Bornosoft Products
products.bornoMaps: Interactive career roadmaps with 75+ learning paths
products.bornoAi: AI-powered learning assistant and study tools
products.bornoCareer: Resume, ATS checker, interview prep & career hub

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Questions, feedback, or partnership — we'd love to hear from you.
